Method

WPEPlatformDRMDisplayDRMsupports_modifiers

Declaration [src] 

gboolean
wpe_display_drm_supports_modifiers (
  WPEDisplayDRM* display
)

Description [src]

Get whether the DRM driver supports format modifiers.

Return value

Type: gboolean

TRUE if format modifiers are supported, or FALSE otherwise.
